summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Google OAuth implementation (replacing Emergent-managed auth with direct Google OAuth). All features working correctly - login page shows Mi-LessonPlan branding with 'Secure Tanzania Mindset' slogan, Google's native 'Continue with Google' button rendered by @react-oauth/google, no Emergent branding visible, backend endpoints properly handle auth flows.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/google returns 400 for missing credential
Backend: POST /api/auth/google returns 401 for invalid token (not 404 or 500)
Backend: POST /api/auth/google endpoint exists and responds correctly
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user data for valid session (test_session_tts_001)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 without session
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 for invalid session
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout returns success
Backend: Admin login at /api/admin/auth/login works with correct credentials
Backend: Admin login returns 401 for invalid credentials
Backend: manifest.json accessible with Mi-LessonPlan branding
Backend: Login page accessible with Mi-LessonPlan branding
Backend: No 'Made with Emergent' badge in login page HTML
Frontend: Login page H1 shows 'Mi-LessonPlan'
Frontend: Login page shows 'Secure Tanzania Mindset' slogan
Frontend: Google login button container [data-testid='google-login-btn'] present
Frontend: Google OAuth iframe rendered inside container (Google SDK working)
Frontend: No 'Made with Emergent' badge on login page
Frontend: Admin Login link visible with [data-testid='admin-login-link']
Frontend: Logo with alt='Mi-LessonPlan' found on login page
Frontend: Admin login form works - redirects to /admin/dashboard after login
Frontend: Dashboard shows Mi-LessonPlan logo in header when logged in
Frontend: No Emergent branding on dashboard
Frontend: Login page redirects to /dashboard when user is already logged in
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google OAuth implementation verified. Login page uses @react-oauth/google GoogleLogin component which renders Google's native 'Continue with Google' button in an iframe. Backend POST /api/auth/google endpoint verifies Google ID tokens using google-auth library. Note: Actual Google OAuth flow cannot be fully tested in preview environment due to domain mismatch with Google's authorized origins - this is expected. All other auth flows (session validation, logout, admin login) working correctly.

login_page_branding.admin_link: Admin Login link visible at bottom

auth_flows.login_redirect: Login page redirects to /dashboard if user already logged in
auth_flows.session_validation: GET /api/auth/me returns user data for valid session

notes.google_oauth_limitation: Actual Google OAuth flow cannot be tested in preview environment because the preview domain is not in Google's authorized JavaScript origins. The tests verify: (1) UI renders correctly, (2) backend endpoint responds properly to valid/invalid requests, (3) no Emergent branding anywhere.
